questions.question: What is the average of the following 5 consecutive even numbers: 32, 34, 36, 38, 40?
questions.trick: For a consecutive arithmetic sequence, the average is simply the exact middle term.

questions.question: Find the next number in the series: 16, 20, 24, 28, 32, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows an Arithmetic Progression with a constant difference of 4. So, 32 + (4) = 36.
questions.trick: Always check the difference between the first and second terms and verify across the series.

questions.question: What will be the Simple Interest on a principal amount of Rs. 7800 at an interest rate of 12% per annum over 4 years?
A can complete a piece of work in 32 days while B can complete the same work in 48 days. If they work together, in how many days will they complete the work?
questions.explanation: Work = 32 * 48 = 1536. Rate = 32 + 48 = 80. Time = Work / Rate = 19.20 days.

questions.question: Which is the largest planet in our solar system?
Who wrote the national anthem of India?
If CAT is coded as FDW, how will PEN be coded in that same language?
questions.explanation: Each letter is shifted forward by exactly 3 positions in the English alphabet.
questions.trick: Note the position gap between the first letter of the word and the first letter of its code.

questions.question: Which is the longest river in the world?
Find the odd one out among the following numbers: 36, 49, 122, 64
questions.explanation: 36, 49, and 64 are perfect squares. 122 is not a perfect square.
questions.trick: Memorize squares up to 30 to instantly spot discrepancies.

questions.question:
Statements:
1. All Cars are Trucks.
2. All Trucks are Vehicles.

Which conclusion logically follows?
questions.explanation: If A is a subset of B, and B is a subset of C, then A must be a subset of C completely.
questions.trick: Draw a venn diagram: Small circle A inside Medium B inside Large C.

questions.question: Who was the first President of India?
If an article is bought for Rs. 720 and sold at a profit of 30%, what is the selling price?
questions.trick: Calculate 10% of CP, multiply, and add it conceptually.
